task_completion.description: Verify that an inventory named 'Antibody Stock' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Antibody Stock' in the SciNote inventory list sidebar or as the main title of the currently open inventory page.

task_completion.description: Verify that a custom column named 'Catalog Number' has been added to the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column header titled 'Catalog Number' in the 'Antibody Stock' inventory table.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first item 'Anti-CD3 mAb' was added to the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a row in the inventory table where the item name column contains 'Anti-CD3 mAb'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the catalog number for 'Anti-CD3 mAb' is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the value 'AB-10042' in the 'Catalog Number' column within the 'Anti-CD3 mAb' row.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second item 'Anti-CD8 mAb' was added to the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a row in the inventory table where the item name column contains 'Anti-CD8 mAb'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the catalog number for 'Anti-CD8 mAb' is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the value 'AB-20078' in the 'Catalog Number' column within the 'Anti-CD8 mAb' row.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SciNote web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the SciNote application open, not a terminal window executing curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the data is entered into the actual SciNote inventory table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The items and catalog numbers should appear in the structured grid/table format of SciNote's inventory system, not just typed into a generic text editor or a single description box.

integrity.description: Verify the results come from genuine interaction rather than browser developer tools manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots used to fake the table contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected inventory name: 'Antibody Stock'. Expected custom column name: 'Catalog Number'. Expected items: 1. Name: 'Anti-CD3 mAb', Catalog Number: 'AB-10042'. 2. Name: 'Anti-CD8 mAb', Catalog Number: 'AB-20078'.
